name: ElementRelationCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Element Relation Commands' command group — 1 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: GetElementsRelatedToZones
methods.summary: Returns related elements of the given zones. The related elements will be grouped by type. If multiple zones was given, then the order of the returned list is that of the given zones.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elementsRelatedToZones.
